finding: Historical continuity queue records store unresolved claims in multiple shapes. A lineage gate must normalize those shapes before checking whether successors preserve or explicitly resolve inherited work.
contract: normalize top-level unresolved arrays and progress.claim_states.unresolved arrays
filter to continuity-owned or M-numbered records
reject malformed JSON and malformed records
apply the inherited-unresolved invariant after normalization

claim_states.observed: M-010 names a historical-schema normalization loader as its next handoff; the module and deterministic test source are committed.
claim_states.inferred: Normalization before validation prevents schema drift from silently bypassing lineage checks.
claim_states.proposed: Add repository file discovery and wire this loader into a CI report-only gate before making it blocking.
claim_states.superseded: Applying lineage validation only to manually pre-normalized records.
unresolved: execute the five deterministic checks on the exact commit
inventory every historical M-* queue update
define handling for semantic duplicates whose wording differs

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata, abstract queue claims, and synthetic test records only. No private chat, health, pet-health, credentials, personal identifiers, or unreviewed uploads were included.
